scope.target: Planned v0.3.0 package release data and future retrospective baseline extension
constraints: Do not claim unconfirmed v0.0.1 support
Allow immutable-tag baseline manifests to be added later
Keep v0.3.0 planned or validated only
non_goals: Choose between v0.0.1 and prerelease without user confirmation

validation: Baseline input is immutable when supplied
execution.last_completed_step: Extended v0.3.0 release data and added a fail-closed retrospective baseline admission policy without creating historical tags or manifests.

results.summary: Recorded v0.3.0 package/publication contracts and a future immutable-tag baseline policy while explicitly withholding unconfirmed v0.0.1 compatibility.
results.residual_risk: The historical v0.0.1 candidate remains unresolved until the user confirms and tags an immutable commit and file selection.
